tender.title: Mid Sussex District Council - Housing Support Services for Vulnerable Childless Households (Temporary Accommodation) - AWARD
tender.description:
Mid Sussex District Council (the Council) invites tenders for the provision of a housing support service for vulnerable childless households in (Temporary Accommodation).
      
      The Council has a maximum budget of £35,000 per annum to deliver this service. The Commencement Date for the delivery of the services is scheduled to be on 30th June 2021 at 00:00 hours.  The Contract will be awarded for a period of 3 years until 2024, with an option to extend for up to a further 2 year period subject to performance and at the absolute discretion of the Council.  
      
      The Council is procuring this contract following the Open Procedure under the UK Public Contract Regulations 2015 and the Council's Procurement Code.  The Council will be awarding one Contract for the provision of all services detailed in the Specification. 
      
      Further information can be found within the tender document set which can be downloaded from the ITT tab.

tender.title: Provision of Short Term Supported Accommodation Service for Homeless Families at Grangeway Court
tender.description:
Provision of Short Term Supported Accommodation Service for Homeless Families at Grangeway Court.   To view the full specification and requirements and to express your interest in this opportunity and access the RFQ documentation, please visit www.the-chest.org.uk and search Project ID DN528724.

Questions relating to this document must be submitted via the Chest messaging facility only and telephone calls will not be answered during the live process.
